OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Line 12
Judge Pro Tem : Ora Prochovnick, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Equity Residential Management is present. Represented by Rich Henriquez.
Attorney Paige Simmons for the plaintiff.
Defendant Luis Espino are present.
Attorney Robert Kane appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of December 19, 2016 is vacated. (501)
